title: bidens segetum
intro: Bidens segetum, also known as the corn marigold or beggar's button, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues, such as fever, digestive problems, and skin infections. The health benefits of Bidens segetum include its ability to reduce inflammation, boost the immune system, and act as an antiseptic. Bidens segetum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
